hero.subtitle: Holoul AI develops cutting-edge SaaS products powered by artificial intelligence, serving legal, real estate, and sports industries across the MENA region.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Intelligent solutions built for industries that matter
products.overviewSubtitle: Discover our suite of AI-powered SaaS products designed to transform industries across the MENA region.

myzan.name: Myzan AI
myzan.description: The most comprehensive AI legal assistant for the MENA region. Access legislation, jurisprudence, and legal analysis across 12+ Arab countries.

features.title: Key Features
features.f1: AI Legal Chat — Ask legal questions in Arabic, English, or French
features.f2: Legislation Database — 50,000+ laws across 12 Arab countries
features.f3: Jurisprudence Search — Court decisions and case law analysis
features.f4: Document Drafting — AI-assisted legal document generation
features.f5: Multi-jurisdiction — Compare laws across different countries
features.f6: Daily Updates — New legislation added continuously

myzan.coverageDesc: Comprehensive legal databases across Morocco, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Jordan, Tunisia, Algeria, and Libya.

rawasi.name: Rawasi AI
rawasi.description: Smart real estate analytics and market intelligence for the MENA property market. Data-driven insights for investors, developers, and agents.

features.title: Planned Features
features.f1: Market Analytics — Real-time property market data and trends
features.f2: Price Prediction — AI-powered property valuation models
features.f4: Market Reports — Automated market intelligence reports
features.f5: Portfolio Management — Track and optimize property portfolios
features.f6: Regulatory Compliance — Stay updated on property regulations

tactiq.name: TACTIQ
tactiq.description: Advanced football analytics platform combining AI with tactical analysis. Performance tracking, match prediction, and scouting intelligence.

features.title: Planned Features
features.f1: Match Analysis — AI-powered tactical breakdown of matches
features.f2: Player Scouting — Data-driven player evaluation and comparison
features.f3: Performance Tracking — Real-time player and team metrics
features.f4: Prediction Engine — Match outcome and score predictions
features.f5: Tactical Board — Interactive formation and strategy planning
features.f6: League Analytics — Comprehensive league and tournament data

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To democratize access to AI-powered tools across the MENA region, making professional-grade intelligence accessible to everyone.

about.title: About Holoul AI
about.subtitle: Pioneering AI solutions for the MENA region

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Holoul AI (حلول AI — meaning 'Solutions AI' in Arabic) was founded in 2024 in Casablanca, Morocco, with a clear mission: to build intelligent software products that serve the unique needs of the Arabic-speaking world.
story.p2: We recognized that many industries in the MENA region lacked access to AI-powered tools designed for their specific legal frameworks, languages, and business practices. Our team set out to change that.
story.p3: Starting with Myzan AI — our flagship legal intelligence platform — we've proven that world-class AI products can be built for and from the MENA region. Now we're expanding into real estate with Rawasi AI and sports analytics with TACTIQ.

v1.title: Innovation
v1.desc: We push the boundaries of what AI can do for underserved markets.

v2.title: Accessibility
v2.desc: Professional-grade tools should be available to everyone, not just large corporations.

v3.title: Localization
v3.desc: We build products in Arabic first, respecting cultural and linguistic nuances.

v4.title: Integrity
v4.desc: We handle sensitive data with the utmost care and transparency.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing for all our products

q1.q: Do you offer a free trial?
q1.a: Yes! Myzan AI offers a 14-day free trial on the Professional plan. No credit card required.

q2.q: What payment methods do you accept?
q2.a: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for Enterprise plans.

q3.a: Absolutely. You can cancel your subscription at any time. See our refund policy for details.

q4.q: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
q4.a: Yes, annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly billing.

q5.q: Is there a student or academic discount?
q5.a: Yes, we offer 50% off for verified students and academic institutions. Contact us for details.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.content: By accessing or using any services provided by Holoul AI SARL ('Company', 'we', 'us'), including Myzan AI, Rawasi AI, and TACTIQ (collectively, 'Services'), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our Services.

s2.title: 2. Description of Services
s2.content:
Holoul AI provides AI-powered software-as-a-service (SaaS) products:

• Myzan AI: Legal intelligence and research platform
• Rawasi AI: Real estate market intelligence platform
• TACTIQ: Football analytics and intelligence platform

Services are provided on a subscription basis and may include free tiers with limited functionality.

s3.title: 3. User Accounts
s3.content: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must be at least 18 years old to use our Services.

s4.title: 4. Payment Terms
s4.content: Paid subscriptions are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis. All fees are non-refundable except as specified in our Refund Policy. We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' notice. Payment processing is handled by our authorized payment partners.

s5.title: 5. Acceptable Use
s5.content: You agree not to: (a) use the Services for any unlawful purpose; (b) attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems; (c) reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from our content; (d) use automated systems to access the Services beyond normal usage; (e) share account credentials with third parties.

s6.title: 6. Intellectual Property
s6.content: All content, features, and functionality of our Services are owned by Holoul AI SARL and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. Our AI-generated outputs are provided for informational purposes and should not be considered professional advice.

s7.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
s7.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Holoul AI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the 12 months preceding the claim.

s8.title: 8. Termination
s8.content: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for violation of these Terms. You may cancel your account at any time through your account settings. Upon termination, your right to use the Services will cease immediately.

s9.title: 9. Governing Law
s9.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Morocco. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Casablanca, Morocco.

s10.title: 10. Contact
s10.content:
For questions about these Terms, contact us at: contact@holoul.ai

Holoul AI SARL
Casablanca, Morocco

s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
s1.content: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, payment information, and usage data. We also collect technical data including IP address, browser type, device information, and cookies for analytics and service improvement.

s2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
s2.content: We use collected information to: provide and maintain our Services; process payments; send service updates and marketing communications (with consent); improve our products; comply with legal obligations; and prevent fraud.

s3.title: 3. Data Storage and Security
s3.content: Your data is stored on secure servers with encryption at rest and in transit. We implement industry-standard security measures including SSL/TLS encryption, access controls, and regular security audits. We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide Services.

s4.title: 4. Data Sharing
s4.content: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with: payment processors (for transactions); cloud infrastructure providers (for hosting); analytics services (aggregated, anonymized data); and law enforcement (when legally required).

s5.title: 5. Your Rights
s5.content: You have the right to: access your personal data; correct inaccurate data; request deletion of your data; export your data in a portable format; opt out of marketing communications; and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@holoul.ai.

s6.title: 6. Cookies
s6.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and preferences, and optional analytics cookies to improve our Services. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

s7.title: 7. International Data Transfers
s7.content: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your country of residence. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for all international data transfers.

s8.title: 8. Children's Privacy
s8.content: Our Services are not intended for users under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

s9.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
s9.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through our Services. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

s10.title: 10. Contact
s10.content:
For privacy-related inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer at: contact@holoul.ai

Holoul AI SARL
Casablanca, Morocco

s1.title: 1. Free Trial
s1.content: All new users are eligible for a 14-day free trial of our Professional plans. No credit card is required to start a trial. At the end of the trial period, you will be asked to subscribe to continue using premium features.

s2.title: 2. Monthly Subscriptions
s2.content: For monthly subscriptions, you may request a full refund within 7 days of your initial purchase or renewal. After 7 days, no refund will be issued for the current billing period, but you may cancel to prevent future charges.

s3.title: 3. Annual Subscriptions
s3.content: For annual subscriptions, you may request a full refund within 30 days of your initial purchase. After 30 days, we will provide a prorated refund for the remaining unused months upon request.

s4.title: 4. How to Request a Refund
s4.content: To request a refund, contact us at contact@holoul.ai with your account email and reason for the refund. We aim to process all refund requests within 5-10 business days.

s5.title: 5. Exceptions
s5.content: Refunds will not be issued in cases of: violation of our Terms of Service; fraudulent activity; abuse of the refund policy (e.g., repeated subscriptions and cancellations); or chargebacks initiated without first contacting us.

s6.title: 6. Contact
s6.content:
For refund inquiries, contact us at: contact@holoul.ai

Holoul AI SARL
Casablanca, Morocco
